testcase.name: dashboardTest

error.message:
element click intercepted: Element is not clickable at point (208, 610). Other element would receive the click:
...
(Session info: chrome=102.0.5005.63) Build info: version: '4.1.3', revision: '7b1ebf28ef' System info: host: 'DESKTOP-19NCAKV', ip: '192.168.56.1', os.name: 'Windows 10', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '1.8.0_271' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Command: [d8d9bbb71f165b57af1b594fe4f2cecb, clickElement {id=8eb4900a-c021-446f-bac5-618c12cd9706}] Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 102.0.5005.63, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 102.0.5005.61 (0e59bcc00cc4..., userDataDir: C:\Users\dhano\AppData\Loca...}, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:53782}, javascriptEnabled: true, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platform: WINDOWS, platformName: WINDOWS, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:53782/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 102.0.5005.63, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Element: [[ChromeDriver: chrome on WINDOWS (d8d9bbb71f165b57af1b594fe4f2cecb)] -> xpath: //button[contains(.,'Insurance Type')]] Session ID: d8d9bbb71f165b57af1b594fe4f2cecb

testcase.error:
